_comment: USP-only approved offer language for real_estate vertical. Built from uploaded one-pager (Ugly Sweater Party LLC). No external business context (MyPalette, MetaSill, artist, creator, gallery) authorized without cross_vertical_approval.json bridge.

offer_framing.opening_angle: Denver-area workflow improvement firm reaching out to real estate teams and brokerages
positioning_statements: faster lead follow-up and cleaner workflow support for real estate teams
practical workflow support so teams can move faster without replacing agents
human-reviewed systems that fit the way the team already works
offer_framing.call_to_action: brief call to discuss how workflow improvement could serve your team
offer_framing.offer_context: call to explore fit — no cost, no commitment

pain_point_mapping.lead_response_inconsistency: new leads come in but response speed and follow-up are inconsistent
pain_point_mapping.handoff_friction: lead handoff between inbox, admin, CRM, and agents creates friction and dropped balls
pain_point_mapping.manual_coordination: team leads and admin staff carrying too much manual coordination, reminders, and pipeline cleanup
pain_point_mapping.lead_response_lag: reduce lead response lag, tighten handoffs between inbox/admin/CRM/agents

target_client_profile.firm_type: growing real estate teams and brokerages
target_client_profile.firm_characteristics: active lead flow, busy inboxes, too much manual coordination tied up in follow-up, scheduling, internal handoffs, and pipeline support
target_client_profile.service_area: Denver, Boulder, Longmont, and surrounding areas

process_steps.1_diagnose: Discovery call plus focused review of current workflow, lead flow, friction points, and handoff gaps
process_steps.2_design: Recommend the highest-value fix, confirm scope, and adjust the plan based on client feedback
process_steps.3_build_harden: Implement the solution, hand it off cleanly, and support the team for 2 weeks so it sticks

offer_a.name: Lead Flow + Workflow Review
offer_a.price_rule: never mention $350 in cold outreach — price only if prospect asks

offer_b.name: Done-for-You Automation Starter
offer_b.price_rule: never mention $2,500 in cold outreach — price only if prospect asks
includes: one automation or human-reviewed assisted process

A_tier_named: lead workflow improvement for your Denver real estate team
question about your team's lead follow-up process
C_tier_generic: Denver real estate team workflow improvement opportunity
real estate lead flow and workflow review — Denver
real estate workflow fit call — Denver

body_language_rules.footer_context: founder-led implementation partner for practical workflow support, human-reviewed systems, and operational cleanup

cta_language.primary_cta: reply to book a free 10-minute discovery call
cta_language.call_recipient: reply to the email to schedule with the co-founder
cta_language.barrier_removal: no cost, no commitment — exploratory call only
cta_language.fee_credit_note: 50% of discovery/audit fee applies toward a build

compliance_disclaimer: administrative workflow support only; not legal, mortgage, or financial advice.
why_us_nuance: teams can move faster without replacing agents — human-reviewed systems that fit the way the team already works
author: human_operator_from_uploaded_one_pager
